chapter_title.ar: باب رَمْيِ مَا يَدْخُلُ بَيْنَ الْأَسْنَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 132 – Throwing what enters in between the teeth

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/225)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/225)
text: قَالَ لَا يَزْدَرِدَنَّ أَحَدُكُمْ مَا يَتَخَلَّلُ بِهِ فَإِنَّهُ يَكُونُ مِنْهُ الدُّبَيْلَةُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad,
(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Not one of you should swallow what he picks teeth with, for the pus can happen from it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad in a marfu‘ manner who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Do not take light what you use as a toothpick, it can cause a boil in one’s belly (that may cause one’s death).”’
